mapper.select: SELECT id, column_name as columnName, user_id as userId, introduction, cover, state, publish_time as publishTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, section, nums, type, free_start_time as freeStartTime, free_end_time as freeEndTime FROM column_info WHERE state IN (1, 2) ORDER BY section ASC, update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM column_info WHERE state IN (1, 2)

SELECT id, column_name as columnName, user_id as userId, introduction, cover, state, publish_time as publishTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, section, nums, type, free_start_time as freeStartTime, free_end_time as freeEndTime FROM column_info WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, column_name as columnName, user_id as userId, introduction, cover, state, publish_time as publishTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, section, nums, type, free_start_time as freeStartTime, free_end_time as freeEndTime FROM column_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO column_info (column_name, user_id, introduction, cover, state, section, nums, type) VALUES (#{columnName}, #{userId}, #{introduction}, #{cover}, #{state}, #{section}, #{nums}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT id, column_name as columnName, user_id as userId, introduction, cover, state, publish_time as publishTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, section, nums, type, free_start_time as freeStartTime, free_end_time as freeEndTime FROM column_info WHERE state IN (1, 2) AND column_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 20
